executiveSummary: JD Rivera Concrete has built a reputation in the Chico, Paradise, and Oroville concrete market, and your website at riveraconcrete.com shows you're making an effort to get online. But here's the reality: your site is essentially a landing page built on a proprietary page builder -- not a full website. It has no meta descriptions, no title tags visible, zero schema markup, no blog, no image alt text, no reviews section, and minimal written content for search engines to index.

That's a 4.5 out of 10 on our SEO scale, and it means you're invisible for searches like 'concrete contractor Chico CA' or 'driveway installation Paradise.' Your competitors with WordPress sites and proper SEO are capturing those leads instead.

The good news: concrete contractors are one of the least competitive industries for local SEO in Northern California. A proper website with basic SEO would immediately put you on the map for high-value searches. With your established reputation and service coverage across three cities, the ROI on a digital presence is significant.

assessment.title: Website Analysis -- riveraconcrete.com
points: Built on a custom/proprietary landing page builder -- not WordPress, Wix, or any standard CMS.
Essentially a single landing page focused on lead generation -- not a full website.
Mobile responsive design with media queries for 480px+ breakpoints.
Service area covers Chico, Paradise, and Oroville.
BBB listed and has HomeAdvisor/BuildZoom profiles.

assessment.title: Critical SEO Gaps
points: No meta descriptions or optimized title tags detected on any page.
Zero schema markup -- no LocalBusiness, ConcreteContractor, or Service structured data.
Minimal written content -- not enough for search engines to understand what you offer.
No image alt text on any images -- invisible to Google Image Search.
No blog or content marketing strategy.
No customer reviews or testimonials displayed on the site.
No dedicated service pages for individual concrete services.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Concrete contracting is a low-competition SEO space in Northern California -- easier to rank than roofing or HVAC.
Competitors with even basic WordPress sites are outranking you for 'concrete contractor Chico' and similar terms.
Your BBB listing and directory profiles show you have a real reputation -- but it's not reflected on your website.
A proper website build would leapfrog most competitors in the Chico/Paradise/Oroville concrete market.

findings.finding: Proprietary landing page builder -- severely limited for SEO
Zero structured data -- no LocalBusiness or Service schemas
No meta descriptions or optimized title tags on any page
Minimal content -- landing page only, no detailed service info
No alt text on any images across the site
No blog or content marketing -- zero organic traffic potential
No reviews or testimonials displayed on website
No dedicated pages for driveways, foundations, patios, etc.
Responsive design present with proper media queries

strategy.title: Phase 1: New Website Foundation (Months 1-2)
actions: Build a professional WordPress website replacing the landing page builder -- full SEO capability.
Implement LocalBusiness and ConcreteContractor schema markup.
Create 5 dedicated service pages: Driveways, Foundations, Patios, Sidewalks, Commercial Concrete.
Write unique meta descriptions and optimized title tags for every page.
Add descriptive alt text to all images.
Integrate Google Reviews widget to display your earned reputation.
Set up Google Analytics and Search Console for performance tracking.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Local SEO & Content Marketing (Months 3-5)
actions: Create location pages for Chico, Paradise, and Oroville with unique content per city.
Launch blog with monthly concrete content: driveway maintenance, foundation types, seasonal tips.
Optimize Google Business Profile with project photos, posts, and review management.
Build citation consistency across directories (BBB, Yelp, HomeAdvisor, Angi).
Implement FAQ schema for common concrete questions.

strategy.title: Phase 3: Growth & Market Expansion (Months 6-12)
actions: Google Ads targeting high-intent concrete keywords in Butte County.
Before/after project galleries with proper image SEO.
Video content showcasing concrete work process and finished projects.
Monthly competitive analysis and ranking reports.
Email marketing for seasonal concrete promotions.

pricingIntro: Concrete contracting is one of the least competitive spaces for local SEO in Northern California. A proper website with basic optimization would immediately put JD Rivera Concrete on the map for the searches that matter most -- and the ROI is faster than almost any other industry.
